channel.title: Open Source on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source on Mike Ball

item.title: How to Contribute to a Project on GitHub
item.description: A simple how-to outlining the Github fork, branch, and PR workflow.

item.title: Quiet Logger: HTML5 WordPress Theme
item.description: An overview of a basic Wordpress theme I was tasked in creating.

item.title: OurPhiladelphia.org Launched
item.description: Some colleagues and I recently released ourphiladelphia.org.
